title: The Tale of Igor's Campaign
description: The greatest work of medieval Russian literature: Prince Igor's disastrous campaign against the Polovtsians, laced with pagan imagery.
introduction: The greatest work of medieval Russian literature: Prince Igor's disastrous campaign against the Polovtsians, laced with pagan imagery.

translation.original_text: Не лѣпо ли ны бяшетъ, братіе, начяти старыми словесы трудныхъ повѣстій о пълку Игоревѣ.
translation.text: Would it not be fitting, brothers, to begin in the old manner the hard tale of Igor's campaign?
